title: Compliance Culture Index
description: Measure your organization's compliance culture through objective behavioral data across 6 key factors.
factorRadarDescription: Current month (blue) vs. previous month (gray) across all 6 CCI factors.
trendChartDescription: CCI score progression over time. Green reference line shows the target value.
departmentHeatmapDescription: CCI factor scores per department. Red = needs improvement, green = on track.
improvementTip: Focus on increasing this factor to improve your overall CCI score.
noData: No CCI data available yet. The first snapshot will be generated at the start of next month.
configDescription: Adjust factor weights to reflect your organization's compliance priorities. Weights must sum to 100%.
factorWeightsDescription: Each factor's contribution to the overall CCI score. Adjust sliders to customize.
livePreviewDescription: Preview of CCI calculation with sample scores and your current weight configuration.
saveFailed: Failed to save configuration. Please try again.
